item.title: Slight rephrasing of the Tcl-related makefile vars to accommodate using a custom tcl build by passing TCLHOME=/tcl/install/root TCLVERSION=X.Y to make, with the defaults taken from their prior hard-coded values. Sidebar: TCLINC is curious because OS package installers apparently place the headers in ROOT/include/tclVERSION, but local installations place them in ROOT/include, so attempting to use a local tcl will pick up the system-wide tcl.h unless TCLINC is also explicitly overridden. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.description: Slight rephrasing of the Tcl-related makefile vars to accommodate using a custom tcl build by passing TCLHOME=/tcl/install/root TCLVERSION=X.Y to make, with the defaults taken from their prior hard-coded values. Sidebar: TCLINC is curious because OS package installers apparently place the headers in ROOT/include/tclVERSION, but local installations place them in ROOT/include, so attempting to use a local tcl will pick up the system-wide tcl.h unless TCLINC is also explicitly overridden. (tags: branch-3.50)
item.dc:creator: stephan
